title: The Class 4
overview: This time, the team we see with Ada is adapting to the conditions of an island while enjoying the sea and sun, setting sail for new adventures. While struggling to survive on the island where they will stay for a certain period of time, things start to get complicated with the addition of mysterious and even scary characters to the comical events they experience.
